items.markdown:
Salt stone warmers are `specialized heating devices used to maintain the temperature of Himalayan salt stones` , which provide unique mineral benefits and gentle exfoliation compared to traditional basalt stones. Unlike basalt heaters that often use water, most salt stone warmers utilize **waterless, dry heat** to prevent the salt from dissolving or becoming rough.[[1]](https://jacquelinemorgandayspa.com/blog/what-is-the-difference-between-a-hot-stone-massage-and-a-warm-himalayan-salt-stone-massage/#:~:text=Salt%20Stone%20Massage?-,A%20Hot%20Stone%20Massage%20and%20a%20Warm%20Himalayan%20Salt%20Stone,added%20skincare%20and%20energetic%20benefits.)[[2]](https://www.nolablissmassage.com/blog/himalayan-salt-stone-massage-vs-hot-stone#:~:text=Benefits%20for%20Your%20Skin%20and,congestion%20and%20promote%20easier%20breathing.)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:14852904947610286802,catalogid:13805379228972882300,gpcid:4548154486553231692&ibp=oshop)[[4]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:1595964970245004993&ibp=oshop)[[5]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:14852904947610286802,catalogid:13805379228972882300,gpcid:4548154486553231692&ibp=oshop)

Professional & High-End Warmers

These units are designed for spa environments, offering consistent temperature control and large capacities.[[1]](https://www.comoros.ubuy.com/en/product/8682MP5Q-dermalogic-massage-stone-heater-professional-spa-salon-stone-warmer-adjustable-temperature-large-cap#:~:text=Experience%20the%20ultimate%20relaxation%20with%20our%20Dermalogic,is%20perfect%20for%20professional%20spas%20and%20salons.)[[2]](https://lamercayman.com/the-ancient-art-of-hot-stone-massage-history-and-healing-benefits/#:~:text=No%20matter%20the%20material%2C%20the%20stones%20are,and%20never%20too%20hot%20for%20the%20skin.)[[3]](https://www.liberia.ubuy.com/product/7TMT3JKSG-chojiah-massage-table-warmer-heating-pads-with-timer-and-4-heat-settings-from-60-to-140-for-spa-bed-73-x-30-l-x-w#:~:text=Who%20Should%20Buy?%20Ideal%20for%20professionals%20offering,added%20warmth%20for%20an%20exceptional%20customer%20experience.)

- **[Saltability Himalayan Salt Stone Warmer](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:13978265474444930458,gpcid:4548154486553231692,headlineOfferDocid:2785874812246733615,catalogid:13805379228972882300,productDocid:14852904947610286802,rds:PC_4548154486553231692%7CPROD_PC_4548154486553231692&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjv1r_S1qKTAxUIRvEDHRL3H1AQxa4PegQIBRAC)** 
	- Features a low-energy, eco-friendly polycarbonate bowl that uses shielded LED lighting to heat stones.
	- Includes a **7-day timer** for automatic start-up and shut-off to match business hours.
	- Heats stones to maximum temperature in approximately **40 minutes**.
	- Available at [Saltability](https://www.saltability.com/products/himalayan-salt-stone-warmers) and [MassageWarehouse.com](https://www.massagewarehouse.com/products/saltability-himalayan-salt-massage-stone-warmer/).
- **Himalayan Salt Bamboo Warming Tray** 
	- Uses a silicon-covered warming pad to maintain a consistent temperature between **108–120°F**.
	- Typically holds up to 20 stones and is preferred for its aesthetic appeal in professional treatment rooms.
	- Available at Universal Companies.[[1]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:14852904947610286802,catalogid:13805379228972882300,gpcid:4548154486553231692&ibp=oshop)[[2]](https://www.spadev.com/massage-hot-stones-warmers-s/132.htm)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:14276222688709503541&ibp=oshop)[[4]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:1595964970245004993&ibp=oshop)[[5]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:14852904947610286802,catalogid:13805379228972882300,gpcid:4548154486553231692&ibp=oshop)

Portable & Home-Use Options

Ideal for mobile therapists or personal at-home use, these units prioritize speed and ease of transport.[[1]](https://www.ubuy.com.bh/en/product/12BKVLI2-electric-hot-stone-massage-set-basalt-hot-stones-set-hot-rocks-massage-stones-kit-with-heater-box-fo#:~:text=The%20integrated%20heating%20box%20efficiently%20warms%20the,for%20mobile%20therapists%20and%20at-home%20relaxation%20sessions.)[[2]](https://www.liberia.ubuy.com/product/BZWVZA2-goodtar-electric-hot-stone-heater-warmer-professional-portable-bamboo-massage-digital-heating-kit-comes-with-12-bamboo-massage-sticks-and-a-heating-ba#:~:text=Designed%20for%20mobility%2C%20this%20massage%20stone%20warmer,alike.%20Perfect%20for%20providing%20soothing%20treatments%20anywhere.)[[3]](https://www.ubuy.com.jm/product/FU2MLOA4I-granpay-hot-stones-massage-set-18pcs-hot-stones-for-massage-with-warmer-basalt-massaging-rocks-with-heater-box-for-spa-warming-therapy-massage#:~:text=The%20portable%20heating%20box%20warms%20stones%20evenly,for%20mobile%20therapists%20or%20at-home%20wellness%20enthusiasts.)[[4]](https://www.u-buy.co.uk/product/2MHACYC-serenelife-portable-hot-stone-massage-warmer-set-spa-kit-with-temperature-control-lcd-display-6-smal#:~:text=Compact%20and%20lightweight%2C%20this%20massage%20stone%20warmer,for%20personal%20relaxation%20or%20professional%20spa%20settings.)[[5]](https://www.gharieni-shop.com/stone-heater-incl.-spoon)

- **SereneLife Portable Massage Stone Warmer (PSLMSGST20)** 
	- An all-in-one electric spa kit that features a travel bag that doubles as a stone heating oven.
	- Equipped with a **digital temperature controller** (70–160°F) and an LCD display for customized sessions.
	- Heats stones in **8–15 minutes** and includes a car adapter for mobile use.
	- Available at Best Buy and Target.
- **[Saltability Mobile Massage Set](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:16521098461281893493,headlineOfferDocid:3552457488345300866,productDocid:3552457488345300866,rds:LO_3552457488345300866%7CPROD_LO_3552457488345300866&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjv1r_S1qKTAxUIRvEDHRL3H1AQxa4PegQICBAI)** 
	- Includes an insulated backpack warmer that retains heat even after being disconnected from power.
	- Features an adjustable thermostat and heats 15 hand-carved stones in roughly 20 minutes.[[1]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:15819081620971561966,catalogid:12692765691813758393,gpcid:672789506258831950,mid:576462569128081795&ibp=oshop)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:15819081620971561966,catalogid:12692765691813758393,gpcid:672789506258831950,mid:576462569128081795&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://www.amazon.com/live/video/056ebe792afc4a4dba8ddd55f38af1b9)[[4]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:3552457488345300866&ibp=oshop)[[5]](https://www.spadev.com/massage-hot-stones-warmers-s/132.htm)

Maintenance & Care Tips

- **Avoid Water** : Himalayan salt stones are naturally antimicrobial but will dissolve or become abrasive if exposed to moisture.
- **Cleaning** : Use a hospital-grade, non-toxic disinfectant like **Decon 30** ; spray and wipe the stones dry immediately after use.
- **Resurfacing** : If stones become rough over time, they can be lightly sanded with sandpaper to restore a smooth texture.[[1]](https://www.nolablissmassage.com/blog/himalayan-salt-stone-massage-vs-hot-stone#:~:text=Benefits%20for%20Your%20Skin%20and,congestion%20and%20promote%20easier%20breathing.)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:14852904947610286802,catalogid:13805379228972882300,gpcid:4548154486553231692&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://www.spadev.com/massage-hot-stones-warmers-s/132.htm)[[4]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:1595964970245004993&ibp=oshop)[[5]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:14852904947610286802,catalogid:13805379228972882300,gpcid:4548154486553231692&ibp=oshop)

Are you looking for a **full starter kit** that includes the stones, or do you already have a set of **salt stones** and just need the warmer?
